basic_details.short_information: The latest J&K Development Finance Corporation Ltd. (JKDFC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Manager (Legal) posts! Published on the official JKDFC website, this recruitment drive offers 1 opening for eligible candidates. Applicants up to 50 years of age and possessing a Graduate degree in Law (LLB) can apply offline on or before 19 June 2026. Find all details about the JKDFC Manager (Legal) vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application process, and notification PDF here.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 50 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be as permitted in GOI Guidelines.

qualification.details: Regular full-time Degree in Law (LLB - 3 years) with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA from a recognized University. Degree in a 5-year integrated course in Law from a recognized University with 50% marks or equivalent CGPA. Fifteen (15) years of post-qualification executive experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JKDFC Manager (Legal) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jkdfc.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JKDFC Manager (Legal) post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the JKDFC Manager (Legal) post is 19th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager (Legal) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a regular full-time Degree in Law (LLB - 3 years) with 50% marks or a 5-year integrated course in Law with 50% marks from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Manager (Legal) post is 50 years as of 30th April 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Manager (Legal) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 60,000-1,80,000 (IDA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Manager (Legal) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Manager (Legal) in the J&K Development Finance Corporation Ltd.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the specified address.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JKDFC Manager (Legal) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Manager (Legal) post will involve a written test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the required experience for the Manager (Legal) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have fifteen (15) years of post-qualification executive experience in the legal field.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the JKDFC's official website, www.jkdfc.org. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the address to send the application form?
faq.answer: The application should be sent to the office of the J&K Development Finance Corporation Ltd, Ground Floor, Jawaharlal Nehru Udyog Bhawan, Railhead Complex, Jammu UT of J&K-180012.
